PERCYJACKSON-TIDEKEYWORD.description:
At the end of your turn, gain [gold]Vigor[/gold] equal to Tide.

Gain 3 [gold]Block[/gold] when Tide goes over its maximum.

Lose 2 HP when Tide falls below 0.
PERCYJACKSON-TIDEKEYWORD.title: Tide
PERCYJACKSON-COMBOSTARTER.description: Must be played in order to start a Combo.
PERCYJACKSON-COMBOSTARTER.title: Combo Starter
PERCYJACKSON-COMBOKEYWORD.description:
Combo count increases with each consecutive attack or Combo card played this turn.

Every 3rd Combo card has 25% extra damage or block.
PERCYJACKSON-COMBOKEYWORD.title: Combo
